good_prompts: Looking for a reliable used compact hatchback (Honda Fit, Toyota Corolla Hatchback or Mazda3), max price $9,500 USD, model year 2014 or newer.
Searching for a used midsize luxury SUV (Lexus RX, Acura MDX, or BMW X5) with AWD and low miles — budget up to $45,000 USD, minimum model year 2018.
